title: CVE-2026-10829: NPort W2150A-W Buffer Overflow
summary: [P1] A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability has been found in the NPort W2150A-W, which could be exploited to execute arbitrary code. No patch is currently available, and no exploits have been reported in the wild. This vulnerability is particularly concerning due to its potential for remote code execution.
